message:
feat(ui): add BenchmarkTable for rich benchmark display (bd-3byb)

Add BenchmarkTable component that renders worker benchmark results:
- Table with columns: Worker, Host, Status, Duration, Relative performance
- Status with colored indicators (OK, Failed, Error, ConnFail)
- Duration formatting with human-readable units (ms/s)
- Relative performance bar showing comparison to fastest worker
- Winner highlighted with lightning icon (★)

Features:
- Rich mode: uses rich_rust Table with styled columns
- Plain mode: ASCII table fallback for non-interactive terminals
- Machine mode: suppresses output (caller uses print_json instead)
- Empty state handling
- Summary with pass/fail counts and winner identification

Helper functions:
- format_ms(): converts ms to human-readable duration
- truncate_str(): truncates strings with ellipsis
- format_relative_bar(): creates visual comparison bar
- find_winner(): identifies fastest worker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
